case_title: CITY HOUSING, INC. VS. ROBERT SPRINGER et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $96.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT SPRINGER, ROBERT
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $13.33 FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY HOUSING, INC.
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY HOUSING, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT SPRINGER, ROBERT DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
WRIT OF POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY HOUSING, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT SPRINGER, ROBERT
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY HOUSING, INC. SERVED NOV-03-2001, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SPRINGER, ROBERT

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SPRINGER, ROBERT THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 520 SOUTH VAN NESS AVENUE, #320, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
WRIT OF POSSESSION RETURNED AND FILED FULLY SATISFIED
